proposal_summary: A proposal by Gauntlet to adjust risk parameters, an interest rate curve parameter, and an incentive parameter for Ethereum Compound v3 WETH to stimulate growth.

disclosed_entities.name: Ethereum v3 WETH Configurator contract
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: The proposal uses the [...] methods of the Ethereum v3 WETH Configurator contract.

claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Increase storefront price factor from 50% to 100%
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: Increase storefront price factor from 50% to 100%

claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Decrease wstETH liquidation penalty from 5% to 2.5%
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: Decrease wstETH liquidation penalty from 5% to 2.5%.

claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Decrease cbETH liquidation penalty from 5% to 2.5%
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: Decrease cbETH liquidation penalty from 5% to 2.5%.

claimed_actions.raw_action: Decrease Annual Borrow Interest Rate Slope Low
claimed_actions.object: Annual Borrow Interest Rate Slope Low
claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Decrease Annual Borrow Interest Rate Slope Low from 0.051 to 0.037
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: Decrease Annual Borrow Interest Rate Slope Low from 0.051 to 0.037.

claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Increase COMP daily supply distribution from 38 to 70
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: Increase COMP daily supply distribution from 38 to 70.

claimed_complexity.reason: The proposal involves basic parameter changes such as risk parameters and incentive updates on a single configurator contract.
claimed_complexity.textual_evidence: A proposal from Gauntlet to adjust 2 asset-specific risk parameters, 1 global risk parameter, 1 Interest Rate curve parameter, and 1 incentive parameter.

disclosed_functions.textual_evidence: The proposal uses the updateAssetLiquidationFactor, setBaseTrackingSupplySpeed, setStoreFrontPriceFactor, and setBorrowPerYearInterestRateSlopeLow methods
